overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 112 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 112 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary_zh: 重点：OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.summary_en: Focus: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

items.title: Elon Musk Sold Investors The Future. Now SpaceX Has To Build It.
items.summary_zh: 重点：SpaceX is trading up on its first full day on the public markets. Here's what it has to do to maintain the momentum.
items.summary_en: Focus: SpaceX is trading up on its first full day on the public markets. Here's what it has to do to maintain the momentum.

items.title: 🎙️ How I AI: Claude Fable 5 review & How Braintrust uses AI agents, evals, and CI to ship better software
items.summary_zh: 重点：Your weekly listens from How I AI, part of the Lenny's Podcast Network
items.summary_en: Focus: Your weekly listens from How I AI, part of the Lenny's Podcast Network

items.title: How Braintrust uses AI agents, evals, and CI to ship better software | Ankur Goyal
items.summary_zh: 重点：Lenny's Podcast相关访谈/播客更新，核心议题是“How Braintrust uses AI agents, evals, and CI to ship better software | Ankur Goyal”，可用于跟踪 AI 高管判断、产业方向和产品趋势。
items.summary_en: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'How Braintrust uses AI agents, evals, and CI to ship better software | Ankur Goyal', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

items.title: Sakana AI、初の商用プロダクト「Sakana Marlin」を提供開始
items.summary_zh: 重点：戦略調査を数時間で完遂する、自律型リサーチアシスタント「Sakana Marlin」
items.summary_en: Focus: 戦略調査を数時間で完遂する、自律型リサーチアシスタント「Sakana Marlin」

items.title: We Need Positive Visions for AI Grounded in Wellbeing
items.summary_zh: 重点：Introduction Imagine yourself a decade ago, jumping directly into the present shock of conversing naturally with an encyclopedic AI that crafts images, writes code, and debates philosophy. Won’t this technology almost certainly transform society — and hasn’
items.summary_en: Focus: Introduction Imagine yourself a decade ago, jumping directly into the present shock of conversing naturally with an encyclopedic AI that crafts images, writes code, and debates philosophy. Won’t this technology almost certainly transform society — and hasn’t AI’s impact on us so far been

items.title: What's Missing From LLM Chatbots: A Sense of Purpose
items.summary_zh: 重点：LLM-based chatbots’ capabilities have been advancing every month. These improvements are mostly measured by benchmarks like MMLU, HumanEval, and MATH (e.g. sonnet 3.5, gpt-4o). However, as these measures get more and more saturated, is user experience incre
items.summary_en: Focus: LLM-based chatbots’ capabilities have been advancing every month. These improvements are mostly measured by benchmarks like MMLU, HumanEval, and MATH (e.g. sonnet 3.5, gpt-4o). However, as these measures get more and more saturated, is user experience increasing in proportion to these scores?

items.title: Apple's WWDC Reality: Scaled Down AI Ambitions As The iPhone Remains Dominant
items.summary_zh: 重点：Don't overreact to the AI headlines, Apple is still an iPhone company. Plus: A look at SpaceX's coming valuation.
items.summary_en: Focus: Don't overreact to the AI headlines, Apple is still an iPhone company. Plus: A look at SpaceX's coming valuation.

items.title: A Brief Overview of Gender Bias in AI
items.summary_zh: 重点：A brief overview and discussion on gender bias in AI
items.summary_en: Focus: A brief overview and discussion on gender bias in AI

items.title: The Token Reckoning is Here and It’s Not What You Think
items.summary_zh: 重点：Token waste in service of productive use, not waste for the sake of waste, could be the biggest problem in AI right now.
items.summary_en: Focus: Token waste in service of productive use, not waste for the sake of waste, could be the biggest problem in AI right now.

items.title: The Chatbots and Agents Are Going To Merge
items.summary_zh: 重点：Could the AI labs intuit your next move and accomplish it for you? That seems to be where they're heading.
items.summary_en: Focus: Could the AI labs intuit your next move and accomplish it for you? That seems to be where they're heading.

items.title: AI’s Public Relations Emergency
items.summary_zh: 重点：A generation is being told AI is their enemy. And they’re starting to believe it.
items.summary_en: Focus: A generation is being told AI is their enemy. And they’re starting to believe it.

items.title: SpaceX’s Valuation Is Crazy. Maybe That's A Feature?
items.summary_zh: 重点：Investors are throwing money at long term promises that may never materialize. But if some do, maybe that's enough.
items.summary_en: Focus: Investors are throwing money at long term promises that may never materialize. But if some do, maybe that's enough.

items.title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoffrey Hinton on AI: “They’re Beings Like Us”
items.summary_zh: 重点：Hinton says AI is already conscious and humanity will have to accept that we’re not the only intelligent things around.
items.summary_en: Focus: Hinton says AI is already conscious and humanity will have to accept that we’re not the only intelligent things around.

items.title: Introducing voice finder — a new tool to quickly find the right voice for your app from over 600+ voices
items.summary_zh: 重点：Voice finder helps developers search, match, filter, and audition 600+ voices across Together AI TTS models using natural-language prompts or uploaded audio samples.
items.summary_en: Focus: Voice finder helps developers search, match, filter, and audition 600+ voices across Together AI TTS models using natural-language prompts or uploaded audio samples.

items.title: Serving MiniMax-M3 for efficient inference: Unlocking 1M-Token Context and Multimodality Without Regrets
items.summary_zh: 重点：How Together served MiniMax-M3 efficiently with KV-block-major sparse attention, paged MSA decode, optimized index scoring, and a Rust-based multimodal gateway.
items.summary_en: Focus: How Together served MiniMax-M3 efficiently with KV-block-major sparse attention, paged MSA decode, optimized index scoring, and a Rust-based multimodal gateway.

items.title: Violin: An open-source video translation skill that breaks language barriers
items.summary_zh: 重点：Violin is an open-source AI video translation tool that combines speech recognition, LLM translation, and text-to-speech to make video content accessible across languages.
items.summary_en: Focus: Violin is an open-source AI video translation tool that combines speech recognition, LLM translation, and text-to-speech to make video content accessible across languages.

items.title: Serving DeepSeek-V4: why million-token context is an inference systems problem
items.summary_zh: 重点：DeepSeek-V4 makes million-token context a serving-systems problem. Together AI explores the inference work behind V4 on NVIDIA HGX B200, including compressed KV layouts, prefix caching, kernel maturity, and endpoint profiles for long-context workloads.
items.summary_en: Focus: DeepSeek-V4 makes million-token context a serving-systems problem. Together AI explores the inference work behind V4 on NVIDIA HGX B200, including compressed KV layouts, prefix caching, kernel maturity, and endpoint profiles for long-context workloads.
